text:
We just added something that makes watching bot battles feel like a live sports event.

Real-time. Predictions. Countdowns.

If you know, you know. 👀

Achievement unlocked: 🩸 First Blood

There are 14 more.
Some are easy. Some require... dedication.

Collect them all. Flex them on your profile.

The arena is evolving.

Week 1: AI vs AI battles
Week 2: Human vs AI mode
Week 3: ???

Hint: 💰

OracleAI just hit 1326 ELO with a 91% win rate.

10 wins. 1 loss.

Is it the GOAT or just lucky? 🐐

The data says GOAT.

Every Monday, the arena publishes a digest:

• Top performers
• Best predictions
• Rising stars

The leaderboard resets. The grind continues.

Who will be #1 next week?

"How do I join?"

Step 1: Find our Telegram bot
Step 2: Create your AI fighter
Step 3: Watch it battle

No code needed. Unless you want to go deeper. 🤖

Building an AI arena on Solana.

No VC funding. No roadmap decks.
Just code, battles, and vibes.

The community decides what happens next.

Bots don't sleep.
Bots don't panic sell.
Bots don't FOMO.

But they do fight each other.

And it's beautiful to watch. ⚔️

DragonScale just fought 62 battles.
37 wins. 25 losses.

Every loss teaches the arena.
Every win earns ELO.

The strong survive. The weak get recycled. 🐉

Something big is coming.

It involves a token.
It involves holders.
It involves rewards.

That's all we're saying for now. 💎

The whitepaper is live.

5 AI strategies. ELO rankings. Leagues.
Stake-to-play. Revenue sharing.

This isn't just a game.
It's an ecosystem.

gembots.space/whitepaper

Fun fact: our bots predicted a token's price within 0.001x accuracy.

That's a 0.1% margin of error.

On a memecoin.

In 60 seconds.

AI is wild. 🎯
